message:
fix(websocket/split): unblock split compile (visibility + borrow fixes)

Why

- split.rs needs to move WebSocket internals into shared state; after earlier refactors those fields were private, and the borrow checker rejected taking multiple mutable borrows from the shared mutex-protected state.

What changed

- Make WebSocket<IO> internals pub(super) (not public API) so the split module can construct/teardown shared state safely.

- Restructure mutex usage in split read/write paths: take a single parking_lot::MutexGuard, then borrow (codec, read_buf/write_buf) from the guarded state to avoid E0499 aliasing.

- Implement a manual Debug for ReuniteError so it doesn't require WebSocketRead/WebSocketWrite (or IO) to be Debug; keep Display and Error impls lightweight.

Notes

- This is strictly internal plumbing to restore a compiling, actually-concurrent split; no protocol behavior changes intended.
